title: Delhi High Court holds Hockey India and its Secretary General guilty of contempt of court
description: The Delhi High Court on Monday held Hockey India and its Secretary General Bhola Nath Singh guilty of contempt of court for wilfully disobeying court order. Singh and Hockey India were directed in January 2025 to provide links to Syeed Asima Ali, the Vice President of Hockey India, to enable her to participate in all Executive Board Meetings that may be held.Justice Purushaindra Kumar Kaurav has now held that Singh and Hockey India failed to provide Ali with the links of meetings held on Ju
